steps: S6 'accident,palat'->road_accident(6). S7 traffic corroboration Murree Road.
G-10 social boost: count=3, boost=0.20. Murree Road social: count=1, boost=0.00
Murree Road creds: S6=(0.35+0.00)x1.0=0.35 | S7=0.80. mean=0.575. types=2 NOT corroborated. credibility=0.575
NOTE: 0.575 < 0.60 crisis threshold. Formula v2 correctly rejects 1 anon post+traffic as insufficient. Status=MONITORING.
ISB-002 Murree Road/road_accident: 0.575<0.60 -> MONITORING. No allocation until threshold crossed.
ISB-002 note: one additional field_report or social post would push above 0.60.

cascade_effects: Electrical hazard risk in flooded zones

crises.escalation_note: Needs 1 more corroborating source to cross 0.60 crisis threshold

steps: ALLOCATE ISB-001: ambulances=2, rescue_teams=2, police_units=3, medical_vans=1
RESERVE 1 ambulance on standby for ISB-002 escalation.
POOL REMAINING: ambulances=2, rescue_teams=1, police_units=2, medical_vans=1

actions.description: Maintain 2 ambulances on scene at G-10/2
actions.state_change: Ambulance icons remain active at G-10/2 with status ON SCENE
Rescue team markers pulse active; evacuation progress bar on dashboard

actions.description: Place Murree Road on monitoring dashboard
actions.state_change: Yellow MONITORING badge at Murree Road junction; no resource icons deployed

actions.description: Pre-position 1 standby ambulance at G-10 base for rapid Murree Road deployment
actions.state_change: One ambulance shown STANDBY at base with arrow toward Murree Road

actions.description: Issue caution advisory for Murree Road to traffic authority
actions.state_change: Murree Road segment highlighted yellow on traffic overlay

stakeholder_messages.public_english: Emergency alert: Severe urban_flood in G-10. Avoid Srinagar Highway. Use IJP Road as alternate. Stay safe.
stakeholder_messages.public_urdu: ہنگامی الرٹ: G-10 میں شدید شہری سیلاب۔ سری نگر ہائی وے سے پرہیز کریں۔ متبادل راستہ آئی جے پی روڈ استعمال کریں۔
stakeholder_messages.pims_hospital: Mass casualty alert: urban_flood G-10. Prepare 8 trauma beds. ETA of first ambulance: 5 min.
stakeholder_messages.traffic_authority: G-10 Srinagar Highway blocked. Murree Road: unconfirmed accident near Rawalpindi — monitor junction.
stakeholder_messages.iesco_utility: Safety alert: urban_flood in G-10. Risk of electrical hazard. Dispatch crew to assess G-10 sector.
stakeholder_messages.media_command: Incident ID #ISB-001. Type: urban_flood. Severity: 8/10. Confidence: 0.81. Resources: 2 ambulances, 2 rescue_teams, 3 police_units, 1 medical_van. Watch: Murree Road (unconfirmed).
